seoTitle: Mount Royal vs Mount Russell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Royal and Mount Russell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Royal vs Mount Russell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Royal and Mount Russell.
heading: Mount Royal vs Mount Russell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Royal, New South Wales and Mount Russell, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Russell has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mount Royal (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Royal or Mount Russell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Royal has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Mount Russell scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Royal scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Russell scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Royal or Mount Russell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Russell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
